creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

thanks for your submission!

It has unfortunately been 9 months since you submitted this.  If this is
still relevant can you confirm that you still want this in the ports tree?

At any rate it needs an update.  The latest json-rpc-cpp release is 1.1.0 now.
And since we have Python flavors in the ports tree now, the port will have to be
changed for that too.
